title: Code Asset Categories Taxonomy
description: Taxonomy of code asset capabilities organized by domain. Used to classify and index reusable code assets across projects.

direct_dependency.label: Direct Dependency
direct_dependency.description: Mature library that can be used as a direct dependency without copying source code.

implementation_pattern.label: Implementation Pattern
implementation_pattern.description: Design or implementation approach to learn from without copying source code.

extractable_module.label: Extractable Module
extractable_module.description: Small module or adapter that can be extracted and adapted, provided license allows, dependencies are controlled, boundaries are clear, and tests can be written.

research_only.label: Research Only
research_only.description: For research and reference only. Project too large, license risk too high, dependencies too heavy, or architecture conflicts with current stage.

direct_use_allowed.label: Direct Use Allowed
direct_use_allowed.description: Can be used directly as a dependency or copied with attribution.

adapter_required.label: Adapter Required
adapter_required.description: Needs an adapter layer before integration into target project.

inspiration_only.label: Inspiration Only
inspiration_only.description: Only use the design approach or pattern, do not copy code.

license_review_required.label: License Review Required
license_review_required.description: License must be reviewed by a human before any reuse.

do_not_copy_code.label: Do Not Copy Code
do_not_copy_code.description: Do not copy source code under any circumstances (e.g. GPL/AGPL, no license, proprietary).
